clarification: Please add clarification so the AI can more accurately recognize the dish and its ingredients
clarification_example: For example: compound, weight, place of buy...
press_to_analyze: Press camera button below to take photo of your dish or scan product barcode
no_food_detected: No food detected in the photo. Make sure the product is in frame and try again.
